## Summary

- describe the change briefly
- mention data-quality, pipeline, or operational impact

## Validation

- [ ] local checks or script runs completed
- [ ] affected pipeline stage tested
- [ ] export / schema impact reviewed if applicable
- [ ] environment or deployment notes updated if applicable

## AI review

- [ ] Request GitHub Copilot review on this pull request
- [ ] Review Copilot comments and apply relevant suggestions
- [ ] Resolve or dismiss non-applicable Copilot comments with context

- scraping / filtering impact:
- deduplication / export impact:
- secrets / infra impact:
- data quality risk:
